content:
✔ Character Archetype Buffs/Debuffs – Each archetype interacts differently with challenges.
✔ Day/Night Phases – The setting alters challenge parameters (some characters gain boosts at night, others during the day).
✔ Current Buffs/Debuffs – Temporary effects from XP trades, past failures, or artifacts.
✔ Random Selection Elements – Some weeks will randomly assign skill check types (group vs. individual vs. whole class).

📜 Example: Skill Check Complexity in Action
| Week 6: The Hero’s Trial (Classical Mythology) |
|—————————––|––––––––|
| Archetype Buff/Debuff | The Trickster gets a +10 persuasion bonus but must lie to pass. |
| Day/Night Phase Effect | If this challenge occurs at night, players must work in pairs. |
| Current Buff/Debuff | A student who used the Aegis shield may ignore one failure. |
| Random Selection Element | The class must draw from a deck—some will be forced into individual tests. |
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 316 (chunk 316/555)
